CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-19-2019 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Judge: CURTIS E.A. KARNOW; Clerk: Maria Olopernes; Proceedings not reported. (610)
